channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Universities Face Backlash Over Faculty Connections to Epstein
item.description: The release of new Department of Justice (DOJ) documents detailing Jeffrey Epstein’s extensive connections within academia has caused a stir across U.S. universities. Emails spanning years show that E...

item.title: West Bromwich Albion Sack Head Coach Eric Ramsay After Nine Winless Games Amid Relegation Battle
item.description: West Bromwich Albion have parted ways with head coach Eric Ramsay after a brief and unsuccessful tenure of just nine games. The 34-year-old Ramsay, who previously worked as a coach at Manchester Unite...

item.title: Police End Searches at Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor's Former Royal Lodge as Parliament Supports Release of Trade Envoy Appointment Files
item.description: Thames Valley Police have completed their searches at Royal Lodge in Windsor Great Park, Berkshire, the former residence of Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, following his arrest last Thursday at Sandringha...

item.title: Worst Dressed at the 2026 BRIT Awards: Fashion Flops on the Red Carpet
item.description: As celebrities stepped onto the red carpet for the 2026 BRIT Awards in Manchester, some questionable fashion choices made headlines. Among the worst dressed were Tallia Storm, who wore a skin-tight pl...

item.title: South Africans return home after being misled into fighting in Ukraine
item.description: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa has expressed gratitude to Russian President Vladimir Putin for assisting in the return of 17 South Africans who were allegedly misled into joining the Russia-U...

item.title: Newcastle confident ahead of Champions League last-16 draw after strong European run
item.description: Newcastle United have sent a clear message of confidence to potential Champions League opponents after securing their place in the last 16 with a 3-2 win over Qarabag, completing a dominant 9-3 aggreg...

item.title: UK Government Reopens Revised Sustainable Farming Incentive with Funding Caps and Reforms
item.description: The UK government has announced the relaunch of its flagship environmental payment programme for farmers, the Sustainable Farming Incentive (SFI), after its abrupt closure in March 2025 caused widespr...

item.title: Upcoming Webinar Critiques Canada's Small Modular Reactor Initiatives and Spending

item.title: Man pleads guilty to theft of £2m Fabergé egg, watch and fraud charges in London
item.description: A 29-year-old man has admitted in court to stealing a handbag containing a Fabergé egg and a watch believed to be worth more than £2 million. Enzo Conticello, who is also known as Hakin Boudjenoune an...

item.title: Noah B. Taylor Exits ‘Wednesday’ as Joanna Lumley Becomes Series Regular for Season 3

item.title: Nigeria rejects claims of ransom payment in St Mary's school abduction
item.description: The Nigerian government has strongly denied claims by AFP that it paid a large ransom to Boko Haram for the release of over 200 pupils and staff abducted from St Mary's School in Papiri, Niger State, ...

item.title: Nearly a Quarter of English Councils Unable to Meet Weekly Food Waste Collection Deadline
item.description: A BBC investigation has found that almost a quarter of councils in England will not meet the upcoming government deadline to provide weekly food waste collections to all households. The Department for...

item.title: Xiaomi unveils new 17 Ultra smartphone, AirTag clone, and slim power bank at MWC 2026

item.title: Supreme Court Case Challenges Gun Ownership for Marijuana Users Amid Unlikely Alliances
item.description: A case before the US Supreme Court is raising the question of whether marijuana users should be allowed to legally own firearms. The case involves a federal law that bars habitual marijuana users from...

item.title: Fears of Renewed Violence in Guadalajara After CJNG Rampage and Killing of El Mencho

item.title: How Renewable Energy Is Shaping the Future of Power Generation
item.description: The article discusses how the growing integration of renewable energy is reshaping traditional energy systems. In particular, it highlights efforts by China and France to retrofit coal and nuclear pla...
